description: Style NoteClassic slip ons with a midfoot strap that has metal links, fresh off arrow's new line. This versatile pair can fancy up a simple ensemble or tone down a blingy one. Style this with one tonal piece in your outfit. Comes with a shoe horn.Product DetailsTapering toed brown upper with slip on stylingMetal and leather strap across the midfootTPR outsole with a stacked heel and texturing on the forefootMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
